computedStyles.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
computedStyles.--font-mono:
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono",
      "Courier New", monospace
computedStyles.--font-sans:
ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji",
      "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
computedStyles.--default-font-family:
ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji",
      "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
computedStyles.--default-mono-font-family:
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono",
      "Courier New", monospace
